_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Work with the general counsel, external affairs and businesses to ensure both existing and new services comply with privacy and data security obligations.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in advising on data processing agreements, standard contractual clauses, binding corporate rules, and other cross-border data transfer mechanisms, ensuring compliance with applicable jurisdictional requirements and supervisory guidance.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-S-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-007 (RC, cosine: 0.523), SP-T-005 (SP, cosine: 0.514).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.567). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DCWF-only terms [affairs, businesses, comply, counsel, ensure, existing] vs WIDAI-only terms [advising, agreements, applicable, binding, border, clauses] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.871 (P=0.875, R=0.868). Balanced P/R — the 23-word DCWF element and 28-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Work with the general counsel, external affairs and businesses to ensure both ex" and "Skill in advising on data processing agreements, standard contractual clauses, b" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.555 ≈ STS 0.567 (gap 0.011). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.8%. Shared tokens: [data]. DCWF-only: [affairs, businesses, comply, counsel, ensure, existing]. WIDAI-only: [advising, agreements, applicable, binding, border, clauses].
